author: Gustav Welinder
name: Stacked Hyperparameter Tuning + Eval2048
blurb: Non-record (RTX 5090, 20 train shards): Stacked 5 hyperparameter fixes on the baseline 9x512 architecture. Key finding: WARMDOWN_ITERS=1200 is broken at 600s wallclock (fires from step 1); fix to 3000 plus MATRIX_LR=0.06, LOGIT_SOFTCAP=15, MUON_MOMENTUM=0.99, quarter-batch 131K tokens, and EVAL_SEQ_LEN=2048 together bring val_bpb from 1.362 to 1.336. Also tested butterfly MLP factorization, reservoir random MLPs, depth recurrence, and 6 alternative iso-byte shapes — none beat the tuned 9x512 baseline. 40+ total experiments via autonomous autoresearch loop.
